parameter_question: Find 2L+ drug acquisition cost values for progressed disease in advanced NSCLC
population: Adults with advanced or metastatic NSCLC
preferred_study_type: microcosting analysis, HTA submissions, cost-effectiveness analyses, cost-analyis, or observational studies reporting 2L+ drug acquisition cost after discontinuation of 1L treatment
exclusion_rules: Exclude studies without progressed-disease utility estimates
notes: Prioritize publications most suitable for HE model input selection
